args.expression=: UM(invoices[*].amount) if invoices[*].status == 'active' else 0, if invoices[*].plan == 'monthly' then 12 * invoices[*].amount else invoices[*].amount, filter(invoices[*].note, contains('promotion'))}

args.expression: sum(if(invoices[*].status == 'active' and invoices[*].plan == 'monthly', 12*invoices[*].amount, if(invoices[*].plan == 'annual', invoices[*].amount, 0)) + if(invoices[*].note contains 'promotion', -invoices[*].amount, 0)) for invoices in invoices

sum(if(invoices[*].status == 'active' and invoices[*].plan == 'monthly', 12*invoices[*].amount, if(invoices[*].plan == 'annual', invoices[*].amount, 0)) + if(invoices[*].note contains 'promotion', -invoices[*].amount, 0)) for invoices in invoices

sum(if(status == 'active' and plan == 'monthly', 12*amount, if(plan == 'annual', amount, 0)) + if(note contains 'promotion', -amount, 0)) for i in invoices for status, plan, amount, note in [i.values() for i in invoices]
